ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of weather data */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Daily Summary, Hourly Observation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather parameter (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather observation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., storm warning, heat advisory) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was issued */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert is expected to end */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* List of areas affected by the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location for which the forecast is issued */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Predicted precipitation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Predicted humidity percentage */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 80%) */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast (e.g., model A, model B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES weather_stations ("location")
)
